title: frankenia campestris
intro: Frankenia campestris, also known as bushy saltbush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to Australia and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Frankenia campestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Frankenia campestris can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
